prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.8 kg; Height 165.7 cm; BMI 19.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.4%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.2kg; 9 months ago 52.2kg; 6 months ago 51.2kg; 3 months ago 50.3kg; current 53.8kg), Height (12 months ago 165.7cm; 9 months ago 165.7cm; 6 months ago 165.7cm; 3 months ago 165.7cm; current 165.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 655mg/g; 9 months ago 672mg/g; 6 months ago 852mg/g; 3 months ago 826mg/g; current 814mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 116mg/dL; 3 months ago 114mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 9.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.99 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
